div.h1: Memory Layout: DLQ Message JSON Structure

p.strong: DLQMessage struct with field offsets, sizes, and sample values

div.p: Field Categories 🔵 Identity: original_topic, original_offset, original_payload 🟠 Failure Context: retry_count, last_failure_reason, failed_at 🟢 Processing: consumer_id 🟣 Replay Tracking: is_replayed, replay_count, last_replayed_at

JSON Serialization • original_payload is base64-encoded for JSON safety • last_replayed_at is optional (omitempty) • first_delivered_at is optional (not shown) • All timestamps are Unix nanoseconds • Max last_failure_reason length: 1024 bytes
